mnemonics: Barter Better, Coinless Cash: Think of Bitcoin as a digital barter system that uses cryptographic proof instead of physical coins or a central bank to create and transfer value.
keyPoints: Decentralized (no central authority like a bank).
Uses cryptography and a public ledger (blockchain) to secure transactions.
commonMistakes: Thinking Bitcoin is the same as blockchain (Bitcoin is an application *of* blockchain technology).
Believing Bitcoin transactions are completely anonymous (they are pseudonymous and recorded on a public ledger).
